html: In this document, the government outlines the collaboration between the Nordic governments during 2025, with a primary focus on the activities of the Nordic Council of Ministers.
tldr: The Swedish government is outlining how Sweden will collaborate with other Nordic countries in 2025. The focus is on the work within the Nordic Council of Ministers, an organization where the Nordic countries address common issues.
lattlast:
The government has published a document outlining how cooperation with our neighboring Nordic countries will be structured in 2025. This collaboration is crucial for the countries to work together on important issues.

The primary focus is on the work within the Nordic Council of Ministers. This is an organization where the governments of the Nordic countries meet to plan and make decisions on matters that affect the entire Nordic region.

By sharing these plans, the government is demonstrating how it intends to utilize cooperation to achieve common goals in the coming year.
